artworks.title: Mist No. I
artworks.story: Hand-dyed in a single bath of grey and sage. The colour settled where it wanted. So did the form.

artworks.title: Dusk Passage
artworks.story: Rose and amber. An evening in October, held still.

artworks.title: Still Water
artworks.story: The largest work from the winter series. Pale blue, almost white. Suspended in the room like breath held before speaking.

artworks.title: Bone Light
artworks.story: Ivory and dust. A quiet presence.

artworks.title: Ember Study
artworks.story: Terracotta and old gold. Sold before it had a wall.

artworks.title: Nordic Drift
artworks.story: Made for Copenhagen. It found its way back north instead.
